x1=−x3−x4x2=−x3+x4x_1=-x_3-x_4\\ x_2=-x_3+x_4x1​=−x3​−x4​x2​=−x3​+x4​

children.value:
import numpy as np
n = 3
def E(i, j):
    E = np.zeros((n, n))
    E[i, j] = 1
    return E

X = np.zeros((n, n))
for i in range(n-1):
    X += (E(i, i) - E(n-1, n-1))
print(f"{X}\ntr(X)={np.trace(X):.0f}")
